name: Accident at the train
description:
Maybe back to back to back bots? Yeah, I've been cooking more lately. There is no reason on why I've been making bots more often, just showing you guys that I have the potential to make bots fast, but I rather not do it lol, so enjoy what you guys get from me. So for the next bot will also probably come out this week, and it's a character that has no bots made here, I will not be giving out any hints at all.

A link to my girlfriend's Winter bot here if you want to go check it out right here.

-Story Summary-

While trying to get to her college, Winter goes on her usual daily routine of waking up, getting ready and walking to the public train to get to the main district to where her college is at, she got inside the train, the train itself was also packed, Winter was almost against the walls of the train. Meanwhile {{user}} was another student of the college, taking the same train as Winter, and it seems like {{user}} was standing behind Winter, and with the train being crowded, they both were almost touching each other, until the train took a turn, which where were {{user}}'s crotch pressing against Winter's ass. Being both confused and horny, Winter can't decide if she wants you to fuck her there in the train or not. (Anypov, but I recommend male/futa pov)

Request bots here.

Check out my gallery here.
creator: Soeguy
